title: Cosmos Glowing Birds — a luminous flock that drifts and chases your cursor through the dark
title_vi: Cosmos Glowing Birds — đàn chim phát sáng trôi và đuổi theo con trỏ trong bóng tối
summary: A flock of luminous birds drifts, wanders and chases your cursor / finger through the dark, leaving soft light-trails. Boids-style motion (damping + random wander + pull toward the pointer), additive white-core→magenta glow on pure black; bird count scales to the screen. Self-contained Canvas 2D, offline, reduced-motion aware.
usage_notes: RUN: open index.html (no deps). TECHNIQUES: pre-rendered radial glow sprite drawn additively ('lighter'); per-bird random wander retargeting; pull toward pointer scaled by depth; motion trails via translucent black fill each frame; chevron wings rotated to heading. INTERACTION: move/touch to gather the flock. TUNE: N (count), pull, damping.
summary_vi: Đàn chim phát sáng trôi, lượn và đuổi theo con trỏ/ngón tay trong bóng tối, để lại vệt sáng mềm. Chuyển động kiểu boids, quầng sáng additive lõi trắng→hồng trên nền đen. Số chim tự co giãn theo màn hình. Canvas 2D tự chứa, offline.
notes: Reference-recreation (Ra) from Alex's video reference. repo cosmos-akashic-effects/web-templates/fx/glowing-birds/.
